titleStmt.title: SII 25.278: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 278. (A.R. No. 278 of 1908.) KARIVAḶAMVANDANALLŪR, SANKARANAYINAR KOYIL TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the kitchen in the Pālvaṇṇanāthasvāmi temple.
This incomplete epigraph is dated in Śaka 1393, Makara 25 śu 10. Tuesday, Mṛigaśīrsha-nakshatra.

It seems to record the royal grant of six mā-kāṇi-mundirigaiyiṉ-araiyēaraikkāl of land for six house-sites (maṉai) in the village [Tā]varanallūr in Āri-nāḍu to six chaturvēdi-bhaṭṭas belonging to the different gōtras and sūtras residing in the village Śrīvallabhach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam on the day of his natal-star Sadaiyam falling on the 26th day of the month Ṛishabha in the Śaka year 1392.

The details of the six shares apportioned to the brāhmaṇas, the boundaries of the lands endowed to them and the names of the donees are mentioned. A street named Āgavarāmaṉ-perunteruvu probably named after a king who assumed the title Āhavarāmaṉ is mentioned as one of the boundaries of the lands endowed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīmat suṣeṇanādhākhya mukhaliṅgeśa śāsanam . svasti
śakābdam 1000 3 100 9 10 3ḷ mel cellāniṉṟa makarañāyiṟṟu Irupattu Añcā
ntiyatiyum pūrvapakṣattu daśamiyum maṅkalavāramum peṟṟa mṛgaśirṣattu nāḷ
Ārināṭṭu ṉikṣepanadi dekṣaṇatirattu tāvaranallūril muṉṉāḷ śakābradam
1000 3 100 9 10 2ṉ mel [iṣapa] ñāyaṟṟu Irupattāṟāntiyati nam kumāraṉ Aḻakaṉ perumāḷ
śrī vallapatevaṉ taṉpiṟantanāḷāṉa cataiyattu nāḷ taṉperāl vaittu
namakkum namtevarkku yeṉāṅkamākattanta śrīvallapac catuṟuveti
maṅkalattu ṉāṉāgotrattu ṉāṉā sūtrattuc catuṟuvetipaṭṭarkaḷ peyar
Āṟukku nām Udaga pūrva dharmmadāṉamāka koṭutta pākamāṟuk maṉai
oṉṟukkum nilam Āṟumākkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ Araiye Araikkālukkum
Ellaiyāvatu Ālaiyattukku teṟku Ākavarāmaṉ perunteruvukkut teṟ
kut teṉ Ellai vīrarākṣataṉ kālukku vaṭakku melellai
Āka Ipperunāṉku Ellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nattatil O ku meṟku niṉṟum vaṉ pala
viṭṭu mā[ la] gotrattu Āśpalāyana sūtrattu śākṣikkuṭi magara bhārati Āṉanti nārāyaṇa
bhaṭṭarukku koṭutta bhāgam Iraṇṭukku maṉai Iraṇṭum Aḷaveṟṟam Uṭpaṭa nilam
iraṇṭum rikaiyiṉ kiḻ Araiye Araikkālum Itaṉ kiḻakku Ācūya
ko sūtrattu muppuṟattu varatarā maṉai Oṉṟum
pākam Oṉṟum Itaṉ kiḻakku kku kiḻakku viśvāmitra go[ trattu] Āśśāyana
sūtrattu maruṅkūr [ śaṅkara] paṭṭaṉukku maṉai Oṉṟum pākam Oṉṟum Itaṉ kiḻakku
rāma
Digital edition of SII 25.278 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
